changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_enquiry ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, listing_id BIGINT NOT NULL, message VARCHAR(1000), is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE listing_enquiry IS 'Buyer enquiries sent against active marketplace listings';
